headline: How It
description: A straightforward process designed to get you from idea to launch without the runaround.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We dig into your problem, your workflow, and your vision. No pitch deck required.

steps.title: Blueprint & Estimate
steps.description: You get a clear plan with fixed pricing. No surprises, no scope creep.

steps.title: Build Sprint
steps.description: We build in focused sprints with weekly demos. You see progress, not promises.

steps.title: Launch & Handoff
steps.description: Your software goes live. You own everything — code, data, the whole thing.
